rulings.Case Title: MARY ANN MEADOWS BALL et al VS. A.W.CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Orders Staying Case Pursuant To Ccp Section 473(B)
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, APRIL 29, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 1. Plaintiff MARY ANN BALL, CHRISTA BOLTON, EDWARD BALL III¿s motion to vacate orders staying case PURSUANT To CCP Section 473(B) is granted. Assuming without deciding that the joinders to the stay motion were valid and capable of being granted notwithstanding that the motion had been taken off calendar, plaintiffs have established good cause under CCP 473(b) to vacate the stay orders due to their genuine belief that the joinders would be taken off calendar. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA HARPER et al VS. LINA ANN LAMB et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, APRIL 29, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 2. Defendant Chevron U.S.A. Inc.¿s demurrer TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT to causes of action 1-7 and 15 is sustained with ten days leave to amend. The phrase ¿asbestos-containing products¿ fails to sufficiently identify a product to which the decedent was exposed as required by Bockrath v. Aldrich Chemical Co., Inc. (1999) 21 Cal.4th 71, 80. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY ERICKSON et al VS. A.W.CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Yarway Corporations Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action (Forum Non Conveniens)
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, APRIL 29, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 3. Defendant Yarway Corporation¿s motion to stay Action (Forum Non Conveniens) is granted and its motion to dismiss is denied. The case is stayed pending a determination whether all defendants are amenable to jurisdiction in Montana or Washington. The decedent¿s extensive exposure history in those states compared to his minimal exposure history in California strongly favors having this case decided in Montana or Washington if all the defendants are amenable to jurisdiction there. Yarway¿s failure to establish that all defendants are amenable to jurisdiction in Montana or Washington requires denial of its motion to dismiss. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY ERICKSON et al VS. A.W.CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendant Yarway Corporations Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action (Forum Non Conveniens)
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, APRIL 29, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 3. DEFENDANT ELLIOTT COMPANY FKA ELLIOTT TURBOMACHINERY CO.,INC.'s Joinder In Defendant Yarway Corporations' Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action (Forum Non Conveniens) is denied as untimely. Plaintiff was not given 16 court days notice. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS GONZALES VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS B*P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al

rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, APRIL 29, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 5. DEFENDANT THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY'S Motion To Dismiss IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.= (220/HEK)
